examples: Inactivity can make your joints stiff, and the bones may begin to degenerate.
Poor diet and physical inactivity also each increase the risk of heart disease and have a role to play in the development of some cancers.
The obesity epidemic began in the 1980s, and many people attribute it to increased portion sizes and inactivity, but that can't be everything.
The group said local authorities needed to take action, as the levels of inactivity were costing lives.
Inflammation and metabolic problems caused by long periods of inactivity are undoubtedly also to blame.
